<!-- Thanks for contributing! See CONTRIBUTING.md for the build/test/release conventions. -->

**What & why**
Summarize the change and the motivation.

**Type**
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tool / prompt / capability
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Docs / CI only

**Checklist**
- [ ] `mvn clean verify` passes locally (tests + coverage gate)
- [ ] New/changed behavior has tests (headless where possible)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / DESIGN.md / `docs/` / CHANGELOG `Unreleased`) if user-facing
- [ ] No secret or mutable VCS reference (commit SHA) hard-coded in source, tests, or docs
